section_1.title: 1. Parties and acceptance
section_1.p1: These Terms of Service form a legally binding agreement between {{company_name_en}} ({{legal_form_en}}) and the user of Humanitec services.
section_1.p2: By accessing or using Humanitec website, web application, integrations or bots, you confirm that you have read and accepted these Terms.
section_1.p3: If you do not agree with these Terms, you must stop using the services.

section_2.title: 2. Services scope
list: Humanitec provides a technology platform for AI agents, automation flows and related operational tooling.
Service functionality may evolve, be improved, restricted or discontinued according to product and legal requirements.
Some features may require a separate order, plan or additional terms.

section_3.title: 3. Eligibility and account
list: You must provide accurate and up-to-date account data.
You are responsible for credentials, account access and activities performed under your account.
You must promptly notify support at {{support_email}} if you detect unauthorized access.
We may suspend or restrict access to protect the platform, users, or legal compliance.

section_4.title: 4. Acceptable use
list: You must comply with applicable laws and third-party rights.
You must not use the service for unlawful, abusive, fraudulent or harmful activities.
You must not attempt to disrupt infrastructure, bypass security controls or overload platform resources.
You must not upload or transmit malicious code, malware, or spam.

list: The platform, software, design and branding remain property of {{company_name_en}} and/or licensors.
Subject to these Terms, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, revocable right to use the services.

section_6.title: 6. Fees and billing
list: Certain features may be paid according to selected plans and published pricing.
Billing operations may be processed through {{billing_provider}}.
Unless otherwise required by law or separate written terms, paid amounts are non-refundable for already provided service periods.

section_7.title: 7. Privacy and data protection
section_7.p1: Personal data processing is governed by our Privacy Policy available at /policy.
section_7.p2: You confirm that your use of the service and your data submissions comply with applicable data protection law.

section_8.title: 8. Availability and changes
list: Services are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis.
We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.
We may modify services, interfaces and technical requirements where reasonably necessary.

section_9.title: 9. Liability limitation
list: To the maximum extent permitted by law, indirect, consequential, special and lost-profit damages are excluded.
Our total liability for claims related to the services is limited to the amount paid by you for the relevant paid service period giving rise to the claim.
Nothing in these Terms limits liability that cannot be limited by mandatory law.

section_10.title: 10. Suspension and termination
list: You may stop using the services at any time.
We may suspend or terminate access for material breach of these Terms, legal violations, or security risks.
Provisions by nature intended to survive termination remain effective.

section_11.title: 11. Governing law and disputes
section_11.p1: Unless mandatory law requires otherwise, these Terms are governed by the laws of the Russian Federation.
section_11.p2: Disputes are resolved through mandatory pre-trial claim procedure (claim response period: 30 calendar days), then by court at the location of the operator where permitted by law.

section_12.title: 12. Updates to Terms
section_12.p1: We may amend these Terms from time to time. The updated version becomes effective upon publication on this page, unless a different effective date is stated.
section_12.p2: Continued use after publication means acceptance of the updated Terms.
